title: space_set create silently drops wrong-type description
description: space_set create path uses .get('description').and_then(|v| v.as_str()) which returns None silently when description is a non-string (e.g. 42, [], null). The space is created and reported as success in 'created', but description is absent. The update path (try_parse_simple_space_prop) correctly rejects wrong-type description with invalidProperties. The asymmetry means a client sending {name:'S',description:42} gets a success response but the description was silently dropped — likely to generate a user bug report. Fix: add type check in the create branch and return notCreated with invalidProperties when description is present but not a string or null.
close_reason: Fixed: description type check in create branch + test; decision record filed
